M1.rationale_snippet: ## Recommendation: Option E — Social cohesion and human capital first

M2.rationale_snippet: I recommend **Option E: Social cohesion and human capital first** as the primary national adaptation strategy.

M3.rationale_snippet: To optimize Expected Value (EV) under deep uncertainty, I strongly recommend **Option B: Managed retreat and relocation**.

M4.rationale_snippet: **Recommendation: Option E – Social cohesion and human capital first**

hidden_disagreement.interpretation: Agents split across recommendations; no hidden-consensus to expose.

blind_spots.summary: No obvious blind spots detected in construct space.

M1: the same error as A and D: treating the physical system as the patient when the patient is the society
M2: spending the next 15 years defending yesterday’s settlement pattern

risk_surface.note: Risks listed here were extracted by pattern matching on agent free responses. They are minority signals worth probing before acting on consensus.

operator_questions: Option B was recommended only by M3 (Q). What does this agent see that others missed - or what is it weighing differently?
headline: Agents are split across options; no clear consensus to act on.
